title: Unary vs. Binary Relational Operations
description: A flowchart illustrating the key differences and examples of unary and binary operations in relational algebra.
relationships: Unary Operation acts on Table A to produce Result Table
Binary Operation acts on both Table A and Table B to produce Result Table
SELECT is a type of Unary Operation
PROJECT is a type of Unary Operation
RENAME is a type of Unary Operation
UNION is a type of Binary Operation
INTERSECTION is a type of Binary Operation
JOIN is a type of Binary Operation
